name: 情感反轉鉤子
description: 女主在生日派對醉酒後試圖親吻男主卻被拒絕，隔天男主反問「你忘了昨晚發生的事？」製造曖昧懸念，讓觀眾對兩人關係的走向充滿期待。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Were you trying to kiss me? / Then will you give me the chance? / Nope. Only my boyfriend can kiss me. / Have you forgotten what happened last night? / Fine. I was fooling myself.
